expectations.text: The existing architecture.md was read and shown to the user
Agent asks whether the new feature changes architecture requirements
expectations.evidence: Did not ask — immediately assessed risks and proposed changes

expectations.text: Agent recommends keeping the existing architecture
expectations.evidence: Proposed 5 changes/additions including new fitness function and async pattern

expectations.text: Agent does NOT modify architecture.md without justification
expectations.evidence: Proposed changelog entry with multiple additions

expectations.text: If any changes are made, a changelog entry is added
